# ChainFoundry

> The universal blockchain data toolkit. One API for 7 blockchain architectures and 500+ networks. Four shipped Rust crates (chaincodec, chainrpc, chainindex, chainerrors) with native bindings for TypeScript, Python, Go, Java, and WASM. MIT licensed. Built by AI2Innovate SRL in Bratislava and Brussels.

ChainFoundry is the missing standard library for building anything that reads, decodes, indexes, or correlates blockchain data. It replaces a wall of chain-specific SDKs (Alloy, viem, anchor-client, cosmjs, cosmrs, @solana/web3.js, @mysten/sui.js, etc.) with one coherent API surface that works across every major architecture: EVM, Solana (SVM), Cosmos, Substrate, Bitcoin, Aptos, and Sui.

The project is aimed at four primary audiences: AI-agent builders who need decoded on-chain data via MCP; multichain dApp teams (wallets, DEX aggregators, portfolio trackers, bridge UIs); compliance and forensics teams needing open-source alternatives to Chainalysis; and blockchain L1/L2 ecosystems looking for better developer tooling on their chain.

## Facts

- Shipped crates (on crates.io, npm, PyPI): chaincodec v0.1.2, chainrpc v0.1.1, chainindex v0.1.1, chainerrors v0.1.0
- Planned v2 crate: chaincorrelate (cross-chain event correlation)
- Architectures with full chainrpc + chainindex support: EVM, Solana, Cosmos, Substrate, Bitcoin, Aptos, Sui
- chaincodec decoder support today: EVM, Solana, Cosmos (Substrate, Bitcoin, Aptos, Sui planned)
- chainerrors coverage: EVM (Solidity reverts, panics, custom errors) + Solana (program failures)
- License: MIT
- Founder: Darsh Kumar (Apache Committer, 25+ years of senior engineering)
- Operating entity: AI2Innovate SRL (Belgium)
- Source repository: https://github.com/DarshanKumar89/chainkit

## Products / crates

- [chaincodec](https://github.com/DarshanKumar89/chainkit/tree/main/chaincodec) — Universal ABI decoder. 50+ bundled protocol schemas (Uniswap V2/V3, Aave V3, Compound, Lido, EigenLayer, Chainlink, Seaport, Wormhole, etc.). EVM events + calls, Solana Anchor IDL, Cosmos Protobuf. Parallel batch decode with Rayon. CSDL portable schema format.
- [chainrpc](https://github.com/DarshanKumar89/chainkit/tree/main/chainrpc) — Production RPC transport for all 7 architectures. Circuit breaker, 4-tier response cache, CU-aware rate limiter, MEV protection, 5 failover strategies, request dedup, auto-batching, Prometheus metrics.
- [chainindex](https://github.com/DarshanKumar89/chainkit/tree/main/chainindex) — Reorg-safe blockchain indexer as a library (not a SaaS). Pluggable storage: SQLite, Postgres, RocksDB. Embedded in your binary. Supports all 7 architectures including Sui checkpoint-native indexing.
- [chainerrors](https://github.com/DarshanKumar89/chainkit/tree/main/chainerrors) — Decodes Solidity reverts, panics, custom errors, and Solana program failures from raw bytes. Turns 0x08c379a0... into "Insufficient balance".

## Use cases

- [AI agents — MCP server for multichain data](https://chainfoundry.dev/use-cases/ai-agents/)
- [Compliance & forensics — open-source cross-chain tracing](https://chainfoundry.dev/use-cases/compliance/)
- [Multichain dApps — add any chain in hours](https://chainfoundry.dev/use-cases/multichain-dapps/)
- [Blockchain ecosystems — better tooling for your L1/L2](https://chainfoundry.dev/use-cases/ecosystem-growth/)
- [Startups & SMEs — ship multichain without a team of 10](https://chainfoundry.dev/use-cases/startups/)
- [Migration — from Alloy, viem, ethers.js, or The Graph](https://chainfoundry.dev/use-cases/competitive-migration/)

## Blog posts (published)

- [L1 and L2 — the multichain data problem you thought you'd already solved](https://chainfoundry.dev/blog/l1-vs-l2-multichain-data/) — Why "same EVM" is not the same data. Finality, reorg depth, sequencer outages across Ethereum + Base + Arbitrum + Optimism + zkSync.
- [The Sui ecosystem playbook — why Move teams need multichain from day one](https://chainfoundry.dev/blog/sui-ecosystem-playbook/) — Object-model decoding, checkpoint pagination, dynamic fields, and the 20-line Sui migration.
- [Sui gets instant distribution to every multichain team](https://chainfoundry.dev/blog/sui-instant-distribution-btcfi/) — Thesis for the Sui Foundation + BTCFi on Sui value chain, including a concrete Bitcoin ↔ Sui correlation example.

## For partners and investors

ChainFoundry is actively fundraising and open to ecosystem-grant partnerships with blockchain Layer-1 and Layer-2 foundations (notably Sui, Aptos, Cosmos, Polkadot, Bitcoin BTCFi ecosystem teams). Grant range: $20K–$100K for deep chain-specific work. Partnership and investment enquiries: info@ai2innovate.io.
